---
title: "Pentyre Anderson Morshead"
---

## Pentyre Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1857/8-1879)

### Description

brother of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

third son of Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead (1822/3-1869), he matriculated at St. Edmund Hall in 1875. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
